result.stdout:
Description:
  Netcode patch given assemblies

Usage:
  netcode-patch <plugin> [<dependencies>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <plugin>        Paths to patch folder/file
  <dependencies>  Paths to dependency folders/files

Options:
  -nv, --netcode-version <netcode-version>                     Netcode for GameObjects version [default: 1.5.2]
  -tv, --transport-version <transport-version>                 Unity Transport version [default: 1.0.0]
  -uv, --unity-version <unity-version>                         Unity editor version (major.minor) [default: 2022.3.9]
  -unncs, --unity-netcode-native-collection-support            Whether Netcode's native collection support is enabled [default: False]
  -o, --output <output>                                        Output folder/file path
  --no-overwrite                                               Sets output path to [assembly]_patched.dll, as opposed to renaming the original assembly
  --disable-parallel                                           Don't patch in parallel
  --log-level <Debug|Error|Fatal|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Sets the minimum log-level. Messages below this are ignored. [default: Information]
  --log-file <log-file>                                        Set a filepath to log to.
  --version                                                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information

Usage:

  --disable-parallel                                           Don't patch in parallel

  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information
